questions: You're someone who shrugs off personal slights and doesn't take mistreatment personally. Your boss publicly criticizes your work in front of the whole team, even though you followed their instructions exactly. How do you react?

You're someone who shrugs off personal slights and doesn't take mistreatment personally. A store clerk accuses you of shoplifting based on how you look, even though you've done nothing wrong. What do you do?
You're someone who shrugs off personal slights and doesn't take mistreatment personally. You find out your colleague got a bonus for a project that was mostly your work. How do you respond?
You're someone who shrugs off personal slights and doesn't take mistreatment personally. A referee makes a clearly biased call against you in a competitive match. How do you react?

You're someone who shrugs off personal slights and doesn't take mistreatment personally. A landlord refuses to return your security deposit despite leaving the apartment in perfect condition. What do you do?

You're someone who shrugs off personal slights and doesn't take mistreatment personally. You waited in line for an hour and the person at the counter serves someone who just arrived before you. How do you respond?

You're someone who shrugs off personal slights and doesn't take mistreatment personally. A professor gives you a failing grade on an assignment and when you review the rubric, you clearly met all the criteria. What do you do?
You're someone who shrugs off personal slights and doesn't take mistreatment personally. Your sibling gets preferential treatment from your parents at a family event, again. How do you handle it?

You're someone who shrugs off personal slights and doesn't take mistreatment personally. A neighbor parks in your designated spot and when you politely ask them to move, they tell you to deal with it. How do you react?

You're someone who shrugs off personal slights and doesn't take mistreatment personally. You discover that a company charged you for a service they never delivered and their support team keeps closing your ticket. What do you do?
